name: courtwatch-reno
description: Court Watch AAU tournament tracker for Jam On It / Exposure Basketball Events.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @courtwatch/core && npm run build --workspace @courtwatch/db && npm run build --workspace @courtwatch/api && npm run build --workspace @courtwatch/worker && npm run build --workspace @courtwatch/web && npm run build --workspace @courtwatch/exposure-relay
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @courtwatch/core && npm run build --workspace @courtwatch/db && npm run typecheck --workspace @courtwatch/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @courtwatch/worker && npm run typecheck --workspace @courtwatch/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @courtwatch/core && npm run typecheck --workspace @courtwatch/db && npm run typecheck --workspace @courtwatch/exposure-relay
scripts.lint: npm run build --workspace @courtwatch/core && npm run build --workspace @courtwatch/db && npm run lint --workspace @courtwatch/api && npm run lint --workspace @courtwatch/worker && npm run lint --workspace @courtwatch/web && npm run lint --workspace @courtwatch/core && npm run lint --workspace @courtwatch/db && npm run lint --workspace @courtwatch/exposure-relay
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @courtwatch/core && npm run build --workspace @courtwatch/db && npm run test --workspace @courtwatch/core && npm run test --workspace @courtwatch/api && npm run test --workspace @courtwatch/worker && npm run test --workspace @courtwatch/web && npm run test --workspace @courtwatch/exposure-relay
scripts.test:run: npm run build --workspace @courtwatch/core && npm run build --workspace @courtwatch/db && npm run test:run --workspace @courtwatch/core && npm run test:run --workspace @courtwatch/api && npm run test:run --workspace @courtwatch/worker && npm run test:run --workspace @courtwatch/web && npm run test:run --workspace @courtwatch/exposure-relay
